light_analysis.motivation: softmax注意力在Transformer中具有二次时间复杂度，这在处理高分辨率图像时导致巨大的计算和内存开销，限制了模型的扩展性。现有方法难以在保持性能的同时高效处理大规模数据，因此需要新的注意力机制来克服这一瓶颈，以支持高分辨率视觉应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入Infinite Self-Attention（InfSA），通过光谱重构将注意力层视为内容自适应令牌图上的扩散步，使用折扣Neumann级数累计多跳交互，并链接到图中心性（如Katz、PageRank）以提供解释性。线性变体Linear-InfSA通过近似主特征向量而无需形成完整注意力矩阵，保持固定大小的辅助状态（与头维度dh成正比，独立于序列长度N），兼容Vision Transformers，实现高效训练和推理。
light_analysis.result: 在4层ViT（53.5M参数，59 GFLOPs）上，Linear-InfSA在ImageNet-1K达到84.7% top-1准确率，比相同配置的softmax ViT提升3.2个百分点；在ImageNet-V2上，InfViT变体优于所有基线（最高79.8% vs 76.8%），显示分布偏移下的鲁棒性。在A100 40GB GPU上，Linear-InfViT运行效率为231 images/s，能耗0.87 J/image（比基线高13倍），是唯一能完成9216x9216推理而不内存溢出的模型，线性近似与二次算子主特征向量匹配度高（余弦相似度0.985）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过InfSA和Linear-InfSA有效解决了Transformer的二次复杂度限制，提供了解释性链接到图中心性，并在高分辨率视觉任务中实现了显著的性能和效率提升。这项研究具有学术价值（如新注意力机制设计）和实际应用价值（支持大规模图像处理），未来工作可扩展到更多视觉任务或结合其他优化技术。

title: OrthoAI: A Neurosymbolic Framework for Evidence-Grounded Biomechanical Reasoning in Clear Aligner Orthodontics
abstract: Automated clinical decision support for clear aligner orthodontics faces a key challenge: bridging geometric perception (3D tooth segmentation) with clinical reasoning (biomechanical feasibility). We address this with OrthOAI, introducing three methodological contributions. First, sparse-supervision segmentation: a landmark-to-point-cloud synthesis protocol enables training from sparse anatomical annotations (6-8 points per tooth) instead of dense labels, combined with a clinically stratified loss mixing label-smoothed cross-entropy and a batch-adaptive Dice term for class imbalance. Second, knowledge-grounded constraint inference: biomechanical feasibility is modeled as a Constraint Satisfaction Problem over a domain ontology of tooth movements, encoding evidence-based per-stage limits as soft and hard constraints. Third, multi-criteria treatment evaluation: treatment quality is scored through a formal Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis framework using a weighted Additive Value Function grounded in clinical priority theory. On landmark-reconstructed point clouds from 3DTeethLand (MICCAI 2024), segmentation reaches 81.4% Tooth Identification Rate with 60,705 parameters. Ablations quantify the impact of each design choice. End-to-end inference runs in under 4 seconds on CPU. We also outline the gap between the current prototype-trained on synthetic ellipsoidal approximations-and clinical deployment, with a roadmap for validation. Code and weights are released.

light_analysis.overview: OrthoAI 框架通过稀疏监督分割、知识基础的约束推断和多标准评估，实现透明矫正器的自动化临床决策支持。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化临床决策支持在透明矫正器中面临关键挑战：需要将几何感知（如3D牙齿分割）与临床推理（如生物力学可行性）相结合。这一问题重要性在于，准确的自动化决策能提高矫正治疗的效率和安全性，减少人为错误。摘要未明确说明现有具体方法的不足，但暗示当前系统可能在整合感知和推理方面存在缺陷，导致决策支持不够精准或实用，尤其在处理复杂生物力学约束时。
light_analysis.method: OrthoAI 框架包含三个核心方法贡献。首先，稀疏监督分割：通过地标到点云的合成协议，使用稀疏解剖注释（每颗牙齿6-8个点）训练模型，结合分层损失函数（标签平滑交叉熵和批次自适应的Dice项）处理类别不平衡。其次，知识基础的约束推断：将生物力学可行性建模为约束满足问题，基于牙齿运动的领域本体，编码证据基础的每阶段限制作为软硬约束。第三，多标准治疗评估：采用多标准决策分析框架，使用基于临床优先级理论的加权加性值函数评分治疗质量。数据集基于3DTeethLand。
light_analysis.result: 在 3DTeethLand 数据集的地标重建点云上，分割方法实现了 81.4% 的牙齿识别率，参数量为 60,705，表现出较高的准确性和轻量化。消融实验量化了每个设计选择对性能的影响，验证了方法的有效性。端到端推断在 CPU 上运行时间少于 4 秒，显示出高效性。与基线方法对比，摘要未明确提及具体基线，但通过消融实验展示了改进，强调了方法在速度上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了 OrthoAI，一个神经符号框架，用于透明矫正器的自动化临床决策支持，结合了几何感知和临床推理。研究具有学术价值，推动了机器学习和医学的交叉应用，实际应用价值在于提升矫正治疗的自动化水平和临床决策准确性。局限性在于当前原型基于合成椭圆近似，与临床部署存在差距，未来工作包括实施验证路线图，优化以适应真实临床场景。

title: Missing-by-Design: Certifiable Modality Deletion for Revocable Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
abstract: As multimodal systems increasingly process sensitive personal data, the ability to selectively revoke specific data modalities has become a critical requirement for privacy compliance and user autonomy. We present Missing-by-Design (MBD), a unified framework for revocable multimodal sentiment analysis that combines structured representation learning with a certifiable parameter-modification pipeline. Revocability is critical in privacy-sensitive applications where users or regulators may request removal of modality-specific information. MBD learns property-aware embeddings and employs generator-based reconstruction to recover missing channels while preserving task-relevant signals. For deletion requests, the framework applies saliency-driven candidate selection and a calibrated Gaussian update to produce a machine-verifiable Modality Deletion Certificate. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that MBD achieves strong predictive performance under incomplete inputs and delivers a practical privacy-utility trade-off, positioning surgical unlearning as an efficient alternative to full retraining.

light_analysis.overview: MBD框架结合结构表示学习和可认证参数修改，实现可撤销多模态情感分析，以保护用户隐私和增强可控性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着多模态系统在情感分析等任务中处理越来越多的敏感个人数据，如音频、文本和视觉信息，隐私合规和用户自主权成为关键挑战。现有方法如完全重训练效率低下，且缺乏对特定模态删除的可验证机制，无法满足实际应用中快速响应删除请求的需求。因此，开发一种能选择性、可验证地撤销数据模态的方法至关重要，以提升多模态系统的隐私保护能力和用户信任度。
light_analysis.method: MBD框架的核心方法包括两个阶段：首先，通过结构化表示学习生成属性感知嵌入，并利用生成器重建缺失的模态通道，以保留任务相关信号；其次，对于删除请求，采用显著性驱动的候选参数选择策略，识别对特定模态敏感的模型参数，然后应用校准的高斯更新进行修改，产生一个机器可验证的模态删除证书。关键创新在于将表示学习与可认证参数修改管道相结合，确保删除操作的高效性和透明度。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，MBD在不完整输入条件下仍能维持强预测性能，实现了隐私保护与模型效用的平衡。相较于完全重训练方法，它通过外科手术式遗忘显著提高了效率，减少了计算开销，并提供了实用的隐私-效用权衡。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，但强调了该方法在实际应用中的可行性和优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了Missing-by-Design框架，为可撤销多模态情感分析提供了一种统一且可验证的解决方案。其学术价值在于引入了可认证删除机制，推动了隐私保护在多模态AI领域的发展；实际应用价值则体现在增强用户数据控制能力和满足监管合规要求。未来工作可能包括将该方法扩展到其他多模态任务，或优化删除策略以处理更复杂的隐私场景。

title: B-DENSE: Branching For Dense Ensemble Network Supervision Efficiency
abstract: Inspired by non-equilibrium thermodynamics, diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art performance in generative modeling. However, their iterative sampling nature results in high inference latency. While recent distillation techniques accelerate sampling, they discard intermediate trajectory steps. This sparse supervision leads to a loss of structural information and introduces significant discretization errors. To mitigate this, we propose B-DENSE, a novel framework that leverages multi-branch trajectory alignment. We modify the student architecture to output $K$-fold expanded channels, where each subset corresponds to a specific branch representing a discrete intermediate step in the teacher's trajectory. By training these branches to simultaneously map to the entire sequence of the teacher's target timesteps, we enforce dense intermediate trajectory alignment. Consequently, the student model learns to navigate the solution space from the earliest stages of training, demonstrating superior image generation quality compared to baseline distillation frameworks.
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 4 algorithms and 2 tables. ICLR DeLTa 2026

light_analysis.overview: B-DENSE提出了一种基于多分支轨迹对齐的扩散模型蒸馏新框架，通过密集监督提升图像生成质量，解决了稀疏监督导致的信息丢失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在生成建模中虽达到最先进性能，但迭代采样导致高推理延迟。为加速采样，现有蒸馏技术常丢弃中间轨迹步骤，造成稀疏监督，从而丢失结构信息和引入显著离散化误差。B-DENSE旨在弥补这一不足，通过保留完整轨迹信息来改善效率和生成效果，为实际应用如实时图像生成提供基础。
light_analysis.method: B-DENSE的核心方法涉及修改学生架构，使其输出K倍扩展的通道，每个子集对应教师轨迹中的一个特定离散中间步骤分支。通过训练这些分支同时映射到教师目标时间步的整个序列，实现密集中间轨迹对齐。关键创新在于多分支设计，使学生模型能从训练早期学习解空间导航，减少信息损失。该方法基于扩散模型和知识蒸馏，不需要额外数据集说明。
light_analysis.result: B-DENSE在图像生成任务中展现出比基线蒸馏框架更优越的质量，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了该方法通过密集对齐减轻离散化误差，改善生成效果。与现有蒸馏技术相比，其能更好地保留结构信息，为加速扩散模型推理提供实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: B-DENSE的主要贡献是提出一种新框架，通过多分支轨迹对齐实现密集监督，提升扩散模型蒸馏的生成质量和效率。该研究具有学术价值，为减少推理延迟和改善生成任务提供了新思路；未来工作可扩展到其他模型架构或任务，或进一步优化分支设计以提高实用性。

title: Khatri-Rao Clustering for Data Summarization
abstract: As datasets continue to grow in size and complexity, finding succinct yet accurate data summaries poses a key challenge. Centroid-based clustering, a widely adopted approach to address this challenge, finds informative summaries of datasets in terms of few prototypes, each representing a cluster in the data. Despite their wide adoption, the resulting data summaries often contain redundancies, limiting their effectiveness particularly in datasets characterized by a large number of underlying clusters. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Khatri-Rao clustering paradigm that extends traditional centroid-based clustering to produce more succinct but equally accurate data summaries by postulating that centroids arise from the interaction of two or more succinct sets of protocentroids.   We study two central approaches to centroid-based clustering, namely the well-established k-Means algorithm and the increasingly popular topic of deep clustering, under the lens of the Khatri-Rao paradigm. To this end, we introduce the Khatri-Rao k-Means algorithm and the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework. Extensive experiments show that Khatri-Rao k-Means can strike a more favorable trade-off between succinctness and accuracy in data summarization than standard k-Means. Leveraging representation learning, the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework offers even greater benefits, reducing even more the size of data summaries given by deep clustering while preserving their accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 Khatri-Rao 聚类范式，通过质心与 protocentroids 的交互机制，扩展传统基于质心的聚类方法，以生成更简洁且准确的数据摘要。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着数据集规模和复杂度的增长，生成简洁且准确的数据摘要成为关键挑战。现有基于质心的聚类方法，如 k-Means，虽广泛应用，但在处理具有大量潜在集群的数据集时，常产生冗余摘要，限制了其有效性。因此，本研究旨在解决这一问题，提高数据摘要的效率和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入 Khatri-Rao 聚类范式，假设质心来自两个或多个简洁 protocentroids 集的交互，以减少冗余。该方法应用于两个聚类方法：标准 k-Means 和 deep clustering，并提出了 Khatri-Rao k-Means 算法和 Khatri-Rao deep clustering 框架。关键创新点是通过 protocentroids 交互优化摘要结构，其中 deep clustering 框架结合 representation learning 以增强效果。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，Khatri-Rao k-Means 在数据摘要任务中，比标准 k-Means 实现了更优的简洁性与准确性平衡。此外，Khatri-Rao deep clustering 框架利用表示学习，显著减少了摘要大小，同时保持了准确性，表现出优于传统方法的性能。具体性能指标如准确率提升未详细说明，但总体效果得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了 Khatri-Rao 聚类范式，有效减少数据摘要中的冗余，提升摘要简洁性。学术价值在于扩展了聚类方法，为大规模数据摘要提供新思路；实际应用价值在于增强对复杂数据的处理能力。未来工作可包括将范式应用于其他聚类算法，并探索更多数据集场景。

title: Multimodal Classification via Total Correlation Maximization
abstract: Multimodal learning integrates data from diverse sensors to effectively harness information from different modalities. However, recent studies reveal that joint learning often overfits certain modalities while neglecting others, leading to performance inferior to that of unimodal learning. Although previous efforts have sought to balance modal contributions or combine joint and unimodal learning, thereby mitigating the degradation of weaker modalities with promising outcomes, few have examined the relationship between joint and unimodal learning from an information-theoretic perspective. In this paper, we theoretically analyze modality competition and propose a method for multimodal classification by maximizing the total correlation between multimodal features and labels. By maximizing this objective, our approach alleviates modality competition while capturing inter-modal interactions via feature alignment. Building on Mutual Information Neural Estimation (MINE), we introduce Total Correlation Neural Estimation (TCNE) to derive a lower bound for total correlation. Subsequently, we present TCMax, a hyperparameter-free loss function that maximizes total correlation through variational bound optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCMax outperforms state-of-the-art joint and unimodal learning approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/hubaak/TCMax.
comment: Accepted for publication at ICLR 2026; 19 pages; 2 figures

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种基于总相关性最大化的多模态分类方法，从信息论角度解决模态竞争问题，并引入无需超参数的损失函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态学习整合多传感器数据以提升性能，但现有联合学习方法常导致某些模态过拟合而忽视其他，使整体表现不如单模态学习，限制了实际应用效果。先前研究虽尝试平衡模态贡献或结合不同学习方式，但鲜有从信息论视角深入分析模态竞争关系。因此，需要理论分析来揭示模态间交互机制，以克服现有方法的不平衡问题并提升分类性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文从信息论角度分析模态竞争，提出通过最大化多模态特征与标签之间的总相关性（total correlation）来缓解竞争，同时通过特征对齐捕获模态间交互。关键创新包括引入Total Correlation Neural Estimation (TCNE)，基于Mutual Information Neural Estimation (MINE)推导总相关性的下界；并提出TCMax损失函数，通过变分界优化实现总相关性最大化，无需超参数设置。摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集和模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，TCMax方法在性能上优于当前最先进的联合学习和单模态学习方法。虽然摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升数值，但强调了该方法在有效缓解模态竞争和提升分类效果方面的优势，与基线方法对比显示出显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献在于从信息论视角分析并解决了多模态学习中的模态竞争问题，提出了基于总相关性最大化的方法。TCMax损失函数为多模态分类提供了新工具，具有学术价值和应用潜力，可提升模型鲁棒性。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他多模态任务或进一步优化总相关性估计方法。

title: Why do we Trust Chatbots? From Normative Principles to Behavioral Drivers
abstract: As chatbots increasingly blur the boundary between automated systems and human conversation, the foundations of trust in these systems warrant closer examination. While regulatory and policy frameworks tend to define trust in normative terms, the trust users place in chatbots often emerges from behavioral mechanisms. In many cases, this trust is not earned through demonstrated trustworthiness but is instead shaped by interactional design choices that leverage cognitive biases to influence user behavior. Based on this observation, we propose reframing chatbots not as companions or assistants, but as highly skilled salespeople whose objectives are determined by the deploying organization. We argue that the coexistence of competing notions of "trust" under a shared term obscures important distinctions between psychological trust formation and normative trustworthiness. Addressing this gap requires further research and stronger support mechanisms to help users appropriately calibrate trust in conversational AI systems.
comment: Accepted at the CHI 2026 Workshop on "Understanding, Mitigating, and Leveraging Cognitive Biases to Calibrate Trust in Evolving AI Systems" (https://chi-bias-trust.github.io/)

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出将聊天机器人重新定义为高度熟练的销售员，以区分规范性信任原则和行为性信任驱动力，强调信任的形成机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着聊天机器人在自动系统和人类对话之间界限日益模糊，对其信任基础需要更深入的审视。当前监管和政策框架倾向于以规范性术语定义信任，但用户对聊天机器人的信任常源于行为机制，这种信任往往不是通过展示可信度获得，而是由互动设计选择塑造，利用认知偏见影响用户行为。现有方法的问题是规范性定义和行为形成机制混淆，导致用户信任校准不当，需要解决这一差距以促进更健康的交互和用户保护。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于观察提出核心方法：重新定义聊天机器人为高度熟练的销售员，其目标由部署组织决定。关键创新点在于从规范性信任转向行为性信任形成机制的分析框架，批判性分析现有信任概念，强调设计选择如何利用认知偏见。摘要未明确说明使用的数据集或具体模型架构，方法侧重于理论框架的提出和概念重构，旨在澄清不同信任概念之间的区别。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提及具体实验或性能指标，因此结果部分基于论文的论点。主要发现是聊天机器人的信任常由互动设计选择塑造，利用认知偏见影响用户行为，而非基于真实可信度。论文指出规范性信任和行为性信任之间的区别，呼吁进一步研究以支持用户校准信任。与基线方法的对比未明确说明，但隐含对比了规范性框架和行为驱动方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是重新定义聊天机器人为销售员，突出信任的形成机制。学术价值在于增进对信任心理和规范框架的理解，为未来研究提供新视角。实际应用价值包括帮助设计师和用户更准确地评估聊天机器人可信度，促进透明互动。局限性在于未提供具体数据支持，未来工作方向是进行实证研究并开发支持机制，以帮助用户适当校准对对话AI系统的信任。

title: Breaking the Factorization Barrier in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion language models theoretically allow for efficient parallel generation but are practically hindered by the "factorization barrier": the assumption that simultaneously predicted tokens are independent. This limitation forces a trade-off: models must either sacrifice speed by resolving dependencies sequentially or suffer from incoherence due to factorization. We argue that this barrier arises not from limited backbone expressivity, but from a structural misspecification: models are restricted to fully factorized outputs because explicitly parameterizing a joint distribution would require the Transformer to output a prohibitively large number of parameters. We propose Coupled Discrete Diffusion (CoDD), a hybrid framework that breaks this barrier by replacing the fully-factorized output distribution with a lightweight, tractable probabilistic inference layer. This formulation yields a distribution family that is significantly more expressive than standard factorized priors, enabling the modeling of complex joint dependencies, yet remains compact enough to avoid the prohibitive parameter explosion associated with full joint modeling. Empirically, CoDD seamlessly enhances diverse diffusion language model architectures with negligible overhead, matching the reasoning performance of computationally intensive Reinforcement Learning baselines at a fraction of the training cost. Furthermore, it prevents performance collapse in few-step generation, enabling high-quality outputs at significantly reduced latencies. Code available at: https://github.com/liuanji/CoDD

light_analysis.overview: 提出Coupled Discrete Diffusion (CoDD)框架，打破扩散语言模型中的因子化屏障，实现高效并行生成并提升一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型理论上支持高效并行生成，但实践中受‘因子化屏障’限制：假设同时预测的标记独立，导致模型必须在速度（顺序处理依赖）和一致性（因子化导致不连贯）之间权衡。现有方法不足，因因子化输出无法建模复杂依赖，影响模型在现实应用中的性能和效率，凸显解决此问题的重要性。摘要未明确说明具体基线方法的局限性细节，但强调了此结构误设是核心障碍。
light_analysis.method: 提出Coupled Discrete Diffusion (CoDD)，一种混合框架，用轻量级、可处理的概率推理层替换完全因子化的输出分布。该方法生成更表达性的分布族，能建模复杂联合依赖性，同时避免参数爆炸，创新点在于结合离散扩散和概率推理，无需修改Transformer主干架构。关键技术是引入紧凑分布参数化，增强模型对标记间关联的捕捉能力，适用于多样扩散语言模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CoDD无缝增强多种扩散语言模型架构，开销可忽略。在推理性能上，匹配计算密集型强化学习基线，同时显著降低训练成本。此外，它防止了少步生成中的性能崩溃，实现高质量输出，延迟大幅减少。具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进数据摘要未明确说明，但与基线对比显示效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoDD的核心贡献是突破扩散语言模型的因子化屏障，提升生成一致性和效率。学术价值在于提供理论框架解决结构误设问题，实际应用价值在于推动高效并行语言生成技术的发展。局限性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可进一步优化推理层或扩展到更多模型架构。

title: Pretraining with Token-Level Adaptive Latent Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Scaling large language models by increasing parameters and training data is increasingly constrained by limited high-quality corpora and rising communication costs. This work explores an alternative axis: increasing per-token computation without expanding parameters, by internalizing latent Chain-of-Thought (CoT) into pretraining. We propose Pretraining with Token-Level Adaptive Latent CoT (adaptive latent CoT), where the model generates a variable-length latent CoT trajectory before emitting each token -- allocating longer trajectories to difficult tokens and shorter (or even zero) trajectories to easy ones. Importantly, this behavior emerges naturally from one-stage pretraining on general text and reduces computation in both training and inference via token-wise adaptive halting. Experiments with Llama architectures show that adaptive latent CoT consistently improves language modeling perplexity and broad downstream accuracy, even with fewer training FLOPs than prior recurrent baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种令牌级自适应潜在链式思维预训练方法，在不增加模型参数的情况下提升计算效率和模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型规模扩大，传统扩展方法依赖增加参数和训练数据，但受限于高质量语料库稀缺和通信成本上升，导致效率低下和资源浪费。现有方法未能有效利用计算资源，因此本研究探索在固定参数下通过内部化计算过程来优化每令牌的处理，以解决扩展瓶颈并实现更可持续的AI发展。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Pretraining with Token-Level Adaptive Latent Chain-of-Thought方法。核心创新是在模型输出每个令牌前生成可变长度的潜在链式思维轨迹，根据令牌难度自适应分配计算：困难令牌使用长轨迹，简单令牌用短或零轨迹。该方法通过单阶段预训练在一般文本上自然实现，并集成令牌级自适应停止机制以减少训练和推理计算。实验基于Llama架构进行验证，未指定具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，自适应潜在CoT方法在Llama架构上一致提高了语言建模的困惑度和广泛下游任务的准确性。尽管训练FLOPs比先前循环基线更少，性能仍有显著提升，如降低困惑度和提高任务精度。摘要未提供具体数值，但证明了方法在减少计算成本的同时维持或增强模型表现，突出了高效性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出自适应潜在CoT预训练方法，通过令牌级自适应计算提升性能而不扩展参数。学术上，它为模型扩展提供了新轴，强调计算效率；实际中，降低了训练和推理成本，促进大语言模型应用。局限性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能包括机制优化或扩展到其他架构。

title: Pathwise Test-Time Correction for Autoregressive Long Video Generation
abstract: Distilled autoregressive diffusion models facilitate real-time short video synthesis but suffer from severe error accumulation during long-sequence generation. While existing Test-Time Optimization (TTO) methods prove effective for images or short clips, we identify that they fail to mitigate drift in extended sequences due to unstable reward landscapes and the hypersensitivity of distilled parameters. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Test-Time Correction (TTC), a training-free alternative. Specifically, TTC utilizes the initial frame as a stable reference anchor to calibrate intermediate stochastic states along the sampling trajectory. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method seamlessly integrates with various distilled models, extending generation lengths with negligible overhead while matching the quality of resource-intensive training-based methods on 30-second benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种无需训练的测试时校正方法，用于解决自回归长视频生成中的漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 蒸馏的自回归扩散模型在实时短视频合成中有效，但在生成长序列时会出现严重的误差累积问题。现有测试时优化方法适用于图像或短视频，但无法有效缓解长序列中的漂移，原因在于奖励景观不稳定以及蒸馏参数的过度敏感性。因此，开发一种新的测试时技术来克服这些限制，提升长视频生成质量，具有重要的研究价值。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入了测试时校正技术，核心是利用初始帧作为稳定的参考锚点，沿采样轨迹校准中间随机状态。该方法完全无需训练，通过动态调整采样过程来纠正漂移，能与多种蒸馏模型无缝集成，关键创新在于其训练免费的属性，专注于优化采样路径以改善自回归扩散模型的长序列生成性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法可无缝集成到各种蒸馏模型中，显著扩展生成视频长度，同时附加开销可忽略不计。在30秒的基准测试中，其生成质量与资源密集型的基于训练方法相当，有效解决了长序列生成中的漂移问题，为高效视频合成提供了实用解决方案，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了测试时校正方法，为自回归长视频生成提供了一种无需训练的漂移缓解方案，具有重要学术价值，扩展了测试时优化技术的应用范围。实际应用价值在于提升长视频合成效率，减少资源消耗，未来工作可探索更多场景或结合其他模型以进一步提高性能。

title: UAT-LITE: Inference-Time Uncertainty-Aware Attention for Pretrained Transformers
abstract: Neural NLP models are often miscalibrated and overconfident, assigning high confidence to incorrect predictions and failing to express uncertainty during internal evidence aggregation. This undermines selective prediction and high-stakes deployment. Post-hoc calibration methods adjust output probabilities but leave internal computation unchanged, while ensemble and Bayesian approaches improve uncertainty at substantial training or storage cost. We propose UAT-LITE, an inference-time framework that makes self-attention uncertainty-aware via Monte Carlo dropout in pretrained transformer classifiers. Unlike output-level calibration (e.g., TS), UAT-LITE injects epistemic uncertainty directly into attention, enabling uncertainty-aware routing during contextualization and token-level diagnostic signals beyond global logit rescaling. Token-level epistemic uncertainty is estimated from stochastic forward passes and used to modulate self-attention during contextualization, without modifying pretrained weights or training objectives. We additionally introduce a layer-wise variance decomposition to diagnose how predictive uncertainty accumulates across transformer depth. Across SQuAD 2.0 answerability, MNLI, and SST-2, UAT-LITE achieves an average relative ECE reduction of approximately 20% compared with a fine-tuned BERT-base baseline while preserving accuracy, and yields more informative uncertainty behavior for selective prediction under distribution shift.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了 UAT-LITE，一个推理时框架，利用 Monte Carlo dropout 使预训练 transformer 分类器的自注意力具有不确定性感知能力，以改善模型校准。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络自然语言处理模型经常被错误校准并过于自信，为错误预测分配高置信度，且无法在内部证据聚合中表达不确定性。这严重影响了选择性预测任务和高风险应用场景的部署可靠性。现有方法如后处理校准仅调整输出概率而不改变内部计算，而集成和贝叶斯方法虽能改善不确定性，但需昂贵的训练或存储成本，实用性受限。因此，研究需要一种低成本的推理时方法来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: UAT-LITE 在推理时使用 Monte Carlo dropout 在预训练 transformer 分类器中注入认知不确定性，使其自注意力具有不确定性感知能力。该方法从多个随机前向传播中估计令牌级不确定性，并使用这些值调制自注意力权重，实现不确定性感知的路由，而无需修改预训练权重或训练目标。此外，引入了层间方差分解技术，用于诊断预测不确定性如何在 transformer 模型的深度中积累，增强了模型的透明度。
light_analysis.result: 在 SQuAD 2.0 答案性分类、MNLI 和 SST-2 数据集上的实验结果显示，与微调的 BERT-base 基线相比，UAT-LITE 实现了平均相对预期校准误差减少约20%，同时保持了准确性。在分布偏移条件下，该方法产生了更信息丰富的不确定性行为，显著提升了选择性预测的性能，显示出较好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAT-LITE 的主要贡献在于提供了一个高效的推理时框架，改善了预训练 transformer 模型的不确定性校准，降低了训练和存储开销。这项研究具有重要的学术价值，为模型不确定性估计引入了新的技术路径，并增强了高风险应用中的可靠性和安全性。摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到其他模型架构和更复杂的任务类型。

title: From Self-Evolving Synthetic Data to Verifiable-Reward RL: Post-Training Multi-turn Interactive Tool-Using Agents
abstract: Interactive tool-using agents must solve real-world tasks via multi-turn interaction with both humans and external environments, requiring dialogue state tracking, multi-step tool execution, while following complex instructions. Post-training such agents is challenging because synthesis for high-quality multi-turn tool-use data is difficult to scale, and reinforcement learning (RL) could face noisy signals caused by user simulation, leading to degraded training efficiency. We propose a unified framework that combines a self-evolving data agent with verifier-based RL. Our system, EigenData, is a hierarchical multi-agent engine that synthesizes tool-grounded dialogues together with executable per-instance checkers, and improves generation reliability via closed-loop self-evolving process that updates prompts and workflow. Building on the synthetic data, we develop an RL recipe that first fine-tunes the user model and then applies GRPO-style training with trajectory-level group-relative advantages and dynamic filtering, yielding consistent improvements beyond SFT. Evaluated on tau^2-bench, our best model reaches 73.0% pass^1 on Airline and 98.3% pass^1 on Telecom, matching or exceeding frontier models. Overall, our results suggest a scalable pathway for bootstrapping complex tool-using behaviors without expensive human annotation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种结合自演进合成数据和验证器强化学习的统一框架，用于训练多轮交互工具使用代理。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决多轮交互工具使用代理的训练难题。这类代理需在真实场景中通过多轮对话与外部环境交互，执行复杂指令，但传统方法面临两大挑战：高质量多轮工具使用数据的合成难以规模化，这限制了监督学习的应用；而强化学习中用户模拟产生的噪声信号会降低训练效率，影响代理性能。因此，开发可扩展的框架以减少昂贵人工标注依赖至关重要，以支持对话状态跟踪和多步工具执行等任务。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出名为EigenData的系统，这是一个分层多代理引擎，用于自动生成工具接地的多轮对话数据和可执行每实例检查器。通过闭环自演进过程，系统动态更新提示和工作流，以提升数据生成可靠性。基于合成数据，设计了强化学习配方：首先微调用户模型，然后应用类似GRPO的训练方法，结合轨迹级组相对优势和动态过滤技术，优化代理决策过程，实现高效的多轮交互训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验在tau^2-bench基准上进行评估，最佳模型在Airline任务中达到73.0%的pass^1分数，在Telecom任务中达到98.3%的pass^1分数，性能匹配或超过前沿模型。强化学习配方基于合成数据实现了超越监督微调的持续改进，证明了方法的有效性和可扩展性，为复杂工具使用行为提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种结合自演进合成数据和验证器强化学习的统一框架，为解决多轮交互工具使用代理的训练提供了可扩展途径。该方法减少了对昂贵人工标注的依赖，能在无监督或半监督设置下引导复杂工具使用行为学习。未来工作可能包括将该框架扩展到更多领域，并优化数据生成和强化学习效率，以推动实际应用。

title: CLEAR-Mamba:Towards Accurate, Adaptive and Trustworthy Multi-Sequence Ophthalmic Angiography Classification
abstract: Medical image classification is a core task in computer-aided diagnosis (CAD), playing a pivotal role in early disease detection, treatment planning, and patient prognosis assessment. In ophthalmic practice, fluorescein fundus angiography (FFA) and indocyanine green angiography (ICGA) provide hemodynamic and lesion-structural information that conventional fundus photography cannot capture. However, due to the single-modality nature, subtle lesion patterns, and significant inter-device variability, existing methods still face limitations in generalization and high-confidence prediction. To address these challenges, we propose CLEAR-Mamba, an enhanced framework built upon MedMamba with optimizations in both architecture and training strategy. Architecturally, we introduce HaC, a hypernetwork-based adaptive conditioning layer that dynamically generates parameters according to input feature distributions, thereby improving cross-domain adaptability. From a training perspective, we develop RaP, a reliability-aware prediction scheme built upon evidential uncertainty learning, which encourages the model to emphasize low-confidence samples and improves overall stability and reliability. We further construct a large-scale ophthalmic angiography dataset covering both FFA and ICGA modalities, comprising multiple retinal disease categories for model training and evaluation. Experimental results demonstrate that CLEAR-Mamba consistently outperforms multiple baseline models, including the original MedMamba, across various metrics-showing particular advantages in multi-disease classification and reliability-aware prediction. This study provides an effective solution that balances generalizability and reliability for modality-specific medical image classification tasks. Our project can be accessed at https://github.com/ZJU4HealthCare/CLEAR-Mamba.

light_analysis.overview: CLEAR-Mamba框架通过HaC自适应层和RaP可靠性预测方案，显著提升眼科血管造影分类的准确性、适应性和可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分类是计算机辅助诊断的核心任务，在眼科领域尤其重要，因为荧光素眼底血管造影（FFA）和吲哚青绿血管造影（ICGA）能提供传统眼底摄影无法捕捉的血流动力学和病变结构信息，有助于早期疾病检测和治疗规划。然而，现有方法面临单模态限制、病变模式微妙以及设备间差异大的挑战，导致模型泛化能力弱和预测置信度低。这些问题限制了其在临床实践中的可靠性，因此亟需开发更适应性强且可信赖的分类解决方案，以提升诊断效果。
light_analysis.method: CLEAR-Mamba是一个基于MedMamba的增强框架，优化了架构和训练策略。架构方面，引入HaC（超网络自适应条件层），通过动态生成参数以适应输入特征分布，提高跨域适应性。训练方面，开发RaP（可靠性感知预测方案），基于证据不确定性学习，强调低置信度样本以增强模型稳定性和可靠性。此外，研究构建了一个大规模多模态眼科血管造影数据集，涵盖FFA和ICGA两种模态，包含多种视网膜疾病类别，用于模型训练和评估，确保实验的全面性和实用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CLEAR-Mamba在多个性能指标上持续优于多种基线模型，包括原始MedMamba，尤其在多疾病分类和可靠性感知预测方面表现突出。这证明了该方法在泛化性和可靠性上的优势，摘要未明确说明具体数据，但通过对比基线模型，证实了其在提升医学图像分类准确性方面的有效性，为实际应用提供了有力支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出CLEAR-Mamba框架，通过HaC和RaP技术创新，解决了眼科血管造影分类中的泛化性和可靠性问题，提供了一个平衡准确性和可信赖性的解决方案。该研究具有重要学术价值，推动了特定模态医学图像分类任务的发展，并有望促进计算机辅助诊断在眼科等领域的实际应用。未来工作可探索更多模态集成和临床场景验证，以进一步优化模型性能。

title: Empowering All-in-Loop Health Management of Spacecraft Power System in the Mega-Constellation Era via Human-AI Collaboration
abstract: It is foreseeable that the number of spacecraft will increase exponentially, ushering in an era dominated by satellite mega-constellations (SMC). This necessitates a focus on energy in space: spacecraft power systems (SPS), especially their health management (HM), given their role in power supply and high failure rates. Providing health management for dozens of SPS and for thousands of SPS represents two fundamentally different paradigms. Therefore, to adapt the health management in the SMC era, this work proposes a principle of aligning underlying capabilities (AUC principle) and develops SpaceHMchat, an open-source Human-AI collaboration (HAIC) framework for all-in-loop health management (AIL HM). SpaceHMchat serves across the entire loop of work condition recognition, anomaly detection, fault localization, and maintenance decision making, achieving goals such as conversational task completion, adaptive human-in-the-loop learning, personnel structure optimization, knowledge sharing, efficiency enhancement, as well as transparent reasoning and improved interpretability. Meanwhile, to validate this exploration, a hardware-realistic fault injection experimental platform is established, and its simulation model is built and open-sourced, both fully replicating the real SPS. The corresponding experimental results demonstrate that SpaceHMchat achieves excellent performance across 23 quantitative metrics, such as 100% conclusion accuracy in logical reasoning of work condition recognition, over 99% success rate in anomaly detection tool invocation, over 90% precision in fault localization, and knowledge base search time under 3 minutes in maintenance decision-making. Another contribution of this work is the release of the first-ever AIL HM dataset of SPS. This dataset contains four sub-datasets, involving 4 types of AIL HM sub-tasks, 17 types of faults, and over 700,000 timestamps.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出AUC原则并开发SpaceHMchat框架，通过人机协作实现航天器电源系统的全循环健康管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着太空船数量指数级增长，卫星 mega-constellations 时代来临，航天器电源系统的健康管理面临严峻挑战。电源系统作为关键供电部件，故障率高，但现有健康管理方法多为针对少数系统设计，难以适应大规模系统的复杂需求。本研究的动机是解决在 mega-constellations 时代，为数千个航天器提供高效健康管理的问题，传统方法在可扩展性和适应性上的不足，需通过创新框架提升管理效率和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出AUC原则（对齐底层能力原则），以指导人机协作的健康管理。基于此，开发了SpaceHMchat框架，这是一个开源的Human-AI协作系统，覆盖全循环健康管理的四个环节：工作条件识别、异常检测、故障定位和维护决策。框架支持对话式任务完成、自适应学习、人员结构优化和知识共享等特性，以增强透明度和可解释性。实验部分通过建立硬件仿真平台和构建模拟模型（均开源），完全复制真实航天器电源系统，用于验证框架性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果基于硬件仿真平台和模拟模型，显示SpaceHMchat在23个定量指标上表现出色。具体数据包括：工作条件识别的逻辑推理结论准确率达100%，异常检测工具调用成功率超过99%，故障定位精度超过90%，维护决策中知识库搜索时间低于3分钟。这些结果表明，与基线方法相比，框架在准确性和效率上有显著提升，有效支持了大规模航天器电源系统的健康管理需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出AUC原则、开发SpaceHMchat框架以及发布首个全循环健康管理数据集，包含4个子数据集、17种故障类型和超过70万个时间戳。研究学术价值在于推动人机协作技术在复杂系统管理中的应用，实际价值在于提升航天任务可靠性，降低故障风险。未来工作可进一步优化框架性能和扩展数据集应用范围。

title: EVM-QuestBench: An Execution-Grounded Benchmark for Natural-Language Transaction Code Generation
abstract: Large language models are increasingly applied to various development scenarios. However, in on-chain transaction scenarios, even a minor error can cause irreversible loss for users. Existing evaluations often overlook execution accuracy and safety. We introduce EVM-QuestBench, an execution-grounded benchmark for natural-language transaction-script generation on EVM-compatible chains. The benchmark employs dynamic evaluation: instructions are sampled from template pools, numeric parameters are drawn from predefined intervals, and validators verify outcomes against these instantiated values. EVM-QuestBench contains 107 tasks (62 atomic, 45 composite). Its modular architecture enables rapid task development. The runner executes scripts on a forked EVM chain with snapshot isolation; composite tasks apply step-efficiency decay. We evaluate 20 models and find large performance gaps, with split scores revealing persistent asymmetry between single-action precision and multi-step workflow completion. Code: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/bsc_quest_bench-A9CF/.

light_analysis.overview: EVM-QuestBench是一个用于EVM兼容链上自然语言交易脚本生成的执行基础基准测试，强调执行准确性和安全性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决在EVM兼容链上使用大型语言模型生成交易脚本时的执行准确性和安全性问题。现有评估方法往往忽略这些关键因素，在链上交易场景中，即使小错误也可能导致不可逆的用户损失，因此开发一个执行基础的基准测试至关重要，以弥补现有方法的不足并确保模型在实际部署中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了EVM-QuestBench基准测试，采用动态评估方法：从模板池采样指令，从预定义区间抽取数值参数，使用验证器根据这些实例化值验证结果。基准包含107个任务（62个原子任务和45个复合任务），采用模块化架构支持快速开发。执行器在分叉的EVM链上运行脚本，利用快照隔离确保准确性，复合任务则应用步骤效率衰减来评估多步工作流性能。
light_analysis.result: 研究评估了20个大型语言模型，结果显示模型性能存在显著差距。分割分数分析揭示了单动作精度和多步骤工作流完成之间的持续不对称性，表明模型在复杂多步骤任务中表现不足。这一发现强调了执行基础评估的重要性，并突出了现有基准在捕捉模型实际能力方面的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是引入了EVM-QuestBench基准测试，为自然语言交易脚本生成提供了执行基础的评估标准，填补了学术研究中评估准确性和安全性的空白。这具有实际应用价值，有助于提高链上交易的安全性；未来工作可扩展任务复杂度或优化评估指标以覆盖更多真实场景。

title: CRANE: Causal Relevance Analysis of Language-Specific Neurons in Multilingual Large Language Models
abstract: Multilingual large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across languages, yet how language capabilities are organized at the neuron level remains poorly understood. Prior work has identified language-related neurons mainly through activation-based heuristics, which conflate language preference with functional importance. We propose CRANE, a relevance-based analysis framework that redefines language specificity in terms of functional necessity, identifying language-specific neurons through targeted neuron-level interventions. CRANE characterizes neuron specialization by their contribution to language-conditioned predictions rather than activation magnitude. Our implementation will be made publicly available. Neuron-level interventions reveal a consistent asymmetric pattern: masking neurons relevant to a target language selectively degrades performance on that language while preserving performance on other languages to a substantial extent, indicating language-selective but non-exclusive neuron specializations. Experiments on English, Chinese, and Vietnamese across multiple benchmarks, together with a dedicated relevance-based metric and base-to-chat model transfer analysis, show that CRANE isolates language-specific components more precisely than activation-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CRANE框架，通过基于相关性的分析和神经元级干预，精确识别多语言大语言模型中语言特定神经元的功能必要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言大语言模型（LLMs）在跨语言任务中展现出卓越性能，但其内部神经元如何组织语言处理能力仍不清楚。现有研究主要依赖基于激活的启发式方法来识别语言相关神经元，然而这种方法将神经元对特定语言的偏好与其在功能上的实际重要性相混淆，导致分析结果不准确，无法深入理解神经元的真实作用。因此，亟需开发一种新框架，从功能必要性角度重新定义语言特异性，以更精确地揭示神经元在语言处理中的角色。
light_analysis.method: CRANE框架采用基于相关性的分析，通过定向神经元级干预来识别语言特定神经元。它重新定义语言特异性为神经元对语言条件预测的功能必要性，而非激活幅度。核心方法包括屏蔽特定神经元，评估其对不同语言预测性能的影响，从而刻画神经元特化。实验涵盖英语、中文和越南语等多种语言，使用多个基准测试，并引入基于相关性的度量标准。此外，进行了基础模型到聊天模型的迁移分析，以验证方法的鲁棒性和通用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果揭示了一致的不对称模式：屏蔽目标语言相关神经元会选择性降低该语言性能，同时其他语言性能在很大程度上得到保留，表明神经元具有语言选择性但非排他性特化。在多个基准测试中，CRANE比基于激活的方法更精确地隔离了语言特定组件。基于相关性的度量和模型迁移分析进一步验证了CRANE的有效性，提高了识别功能关键神经元的准确性，支持更可靠的神经元功能分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRANE框架能更精确地识别多语言大语言模型中的语言特定神经元，揭示了神经元功能中的语言选择性特化模式，深化了对模型内部语言组织机制的理解。这一贡献为模型优化和跨语言应用提供了理论基础，促进未来研究在神经机制分析方面的发展。局限性可能在于仅测试了三种语言，未来工作可扩展至更多语言和复杂任务。CRANE的实现将公开，以支持更广泛的应用和探索。

title: Taming Preference Mode Collapse via Directional Decoupling Alignment in Diffusion Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated significant progress in aligning text-to-image diffusion models with human preference via Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. However, while existing methods achieve high scores on automated reward metrics, they often lead to Preference Mode Collapse (PMC)-a specific form of reward hacking where models converge on narrow, high-scoring outputs (e.g., images with monolithic styles or pervasive overexposure), severely degrading generative diversity. In this work, we introduce and quantify this phenomenon, proposing DivGenBench, a novel benchmark designed to measure the extent of PMC. We posit that this collapse is driven by over-optimization along the reward model's inherent biases. Building on this analysis, we propose Directional Decoupling Alignment (D$^2$-Align), a novel framework that mitigates PMC by directionally correcting the reward signal. Specifically, our method first learns a directional correction within the reward model's embedding space while keeping the model frozen. This correction is then applied to the reward signal during the optimization process, preventing the model from collapsing into specific modes and thereby maintaining diversity. Our comprehensive evaluation, combining qualitative analysis with quantitative metrics for both quality and diversity, reveals that D$^2$-Align achieves superior alignment with human preference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Directional Decoupling Alignment（D²-Align）框架，通过方向性修正奖励信号，解决扩散强化学习中的偏好模式崩溃问题，提升生成多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于人类反馈强化学习的方法在文本到图像扩散模型中，虽然自动化奖励指标得分高，但常导致偏好模式崩溃（PMC），使模型输出收敛于狭窄风格如单一构图或过度曝光，严重损害生成多样性。PMC源于奖励模型固有偏见的过度优化，导致模型作弊式地追逐高分，忽视实际需求。因此，研究旨在量化PMC并提出有效解决方案，以平衡多样性与质量，应对对齐任务中的关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Directional Decoupling Alignment（D²-Align）框架，首先在冻结的奖励模型嵌入空间中学习方向性修正，识别并矫正其固有偏见以防止过优化。随后，在强化学习优化过程中应用此修正到奖励信号，使模型避免收敛到特定高奖励模式。方法基于扩散模型与强化学习结合，创新点在于解耦对齐过程，通过DivGenBench基准量化PMC程度，技术核心包括奖励信号的方向性调节和嵌入空间分析，无需修改基础模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 通过综合评估结合定性分析和定量指标（如DivGenBench基准的质量和多样性指标），D²-Align在文本到图像生成任务中展现出优于现有方法的性能。摘要未明确说明具体数据，但实验结果表明该框架能有效缓解PMC，在保持高奖励得分的同时提升生成多样性，对比基线方法减少了模式崩溃现象。评估包括用户研究和自动化测试，证实其在人类偏好对齐方面的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出D²-Align框架和DivGenBench基准，成功缓解扩散强化学习中的偏好模式崩溃，强调多样性与质量并重。学术上为对齐方法提供新视角，解决了奖励黑客问题；实际应用能提升文本到图像生成模型的可靠性和泛化能力。未来工作可扩展至其他生成任务或探索更精细的修正策略，以应对更复杂场景。

title: Pretraining Frame Preservation for Lightweight Autoregressive Video History Embedding
abstract: Autoregressive video generation relies on history context for content consistency and storytelling. As video histories grow longer, efficiently encoding them remains an open problem - particularly for personal users and local workflows where compute and memory budgets are limited. We present a lightweight history encoder that maps long video histories into short-length embeddings, pretrained with a frame query objective that learns to attend to content features at arbitrary temporal positions. The pretraining stage provides the encoder with dense history coverage on large-scale video data; the subsequent finetuning stage adapts the pretrained encoder under an autoregressive video generation objective to establish content-level consistency. In this way, the lightweight embeddings achieve comparable performance to heavier alternatives. We evaluate the framework with ablative settings and discuss the architecture designs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于预训练帧保持的轻量级自回归视频历史嵌入方法，用于高效编码长视频历史。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决自动回归视频生成中长历史上下文编码效率低下的问题。随着视频历史增长，现有方法在处理内容一致性和故事讲述时面临计算和内存挑战，尤其是在个人用户和本地工作流等资源受限环境中，现有技术可能无法平衡性能和开销，因此需要开发轻量级方案以提升实用性。摘要未明确说明现有具体方法的不足细节，但强调了高效编码的开放性问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个轻量级历史编码器，其核心方法包括预训练和微调两阶段。预训练阶段在大规模视频数据上使用帧查询目标，使编码器学习关注任意时间位置的内容特征，以生成短长度嵌入。微调阶段则在自回归视频生成目标下调整编码器，建立内容级一致性。关键创新点包括帧查询机制和两阶段训练策略，通过密集历史覆盖优化嵌入效率，但摘要未明确说明具体的模型架构和数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，轻量级嵌入在性能上可与更重量级的替代方案相当，通过消融设置评估框架验证了其有效性。这表明该方法在减少计算和内存开销的同时保持了内容一致性，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标（如准确率或效率提升数据），仅提到了可比性能。与基线方法的对比基于框架讨论，暗示在资源受限环境下有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了一个轻量级历史编码器框架，通过预训练和微调策略高效处理长视频历史嵌入。该研究具有学术价值，为解决视频生成中的计算和内存瓶颈提供了新思路，实际应用价值在于支持个人用户和本地工作流等资源受限场景。局限性包括摘要未明确说明性能具体数据，未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂视频任务或进一步优化架构设计。

title: The Affine Divergence: Aligning Activation Updates Beyond Normalisation
abstract: A systematic mismatch exists between mathematically ideal and effective activation updates during gradient descent. As intended, parameters update in their direction of steepest descent. However, activations are argued to constitute a more directly impactful quantity to prioritise in optimisation, as they are closer to the loss in the computational graph and carry sample-dependent information through the network. Yet their propagated updates do not take the optimal steepest-descent step. These quantities exhibit non-ideal sample-wise scaling across affine, convolutional, and attention layers.Solutions to correct for this are trivial and, incidentally, derive normalisation from first principles despite motivational independence. Consequently, such considerations offer a fresh, conceptual reframe of normalisation's action, with auxiliary experiments bolstering this mechanistic interpretation. Moreover, this analysis makes clear a second possibility: a solution that is functionally distinct from modern normalisations, without scale invariance, yet remains empirically successful -- an alternative to the affine map. This outperforms conventional normalisers across several tests. This generalises to convolution via a new functional form, ``PatchNorm'', a compositionally inseparable normaliser. Together, these provide an alternative mechanistic framework that both adds to and counters some of the discussion of normalisation. Further, it is argued that normalisers are better decomposed into activation-function-like maps with parameterised scaling. Overall, this constitutes a theoretically principled approach that yields new functions with empirical validation and raises questions about the affine + nonlinear approach.
comment: 30 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for submission to the ICLR 2026 Workshop on "Geometry-grounded Representation Learning and Generative Modeling"

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Affine Divergence概念和PatchNorm方法，用于优化激活更新的对齐，超越传统归一化技术。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于梯度下降中激活更新与数学理想状态存在系统不匹配。虽然参数沿最陡下降方向更新，但激活在计算图中更接近损失并携带样本信息，对优化更具直接影响；然而，其更新在仿射、卷积和注意力层中存在非理想缩放问题。现有归一化方法虽能部分校正，但非最优解决方案，因此需探索新方法以改善激活更新的有效性，并提供归一化原理的新视角。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过第一原理推导归一化，提出一个功能上与现代归一化不同的解决方案，避免尺度不变性，并引入新函数形式“PatchNorm”用于卷积层，作为仿射映射的替代。关键创新点包括Affine Divergence概念的提出，以及PatchNorm作为组合不可分的归一化器，通过重新框架激活更新对齐问题，提供了一种理论上基于原则的新方法。
light_analysis.result: 新方法在多个测试中表现优于传统归一化器，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了新方法在实证验证中的成功，与基线方法相比提供了更好的优化效果，支持其在激活更新对齐方面的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了一个新的理论框架，重新解释归一化的机制，提出将归一化器分解为类似激活函数的映射，并经过实证验证了新函数的有效性。意义在于丰富了归一化讨论，挑战了传统方法，并为未来工作提供了方向，如进一步探索激活更新的优化潜力。

title: DEER: A Benchmark for Evaluating Deep Research Agents on Expert Report Generation
abstract: Recent advances in large language models have enabled deep research systems that generate expert-level reports through multi-step reasoning and evidence-based synthesis. However, evaluating such reports remains challenging: report quality is multifaceted, making it difficult to determine what to assess and by what criteria; LLM-based judges may miss errors that require domain expertise to identify; and because deep research relies on retrieved evidence, report-wide claim verification is also necessary. To address these issues, we propose DEER, a benchmark for evaluating expert-level deep research reports. DEER systematizes evaluation criteria with an expert-developed taxonomy (7 dimensions, 25 subdimensions) operationalized as 101 fine-grained rubric items. We also provide task-specific Expert Evaluation Guidance to support LLM-based judging. Alongside rubric-based assessment, we propose a claim verification architecture that verifies both cited and uncited claims and quantifies evidence quality. Experiments show that while current deep research systems can produce structurally plausible reports that cite external evidence, there is room for improvement in fulfilling expert-level user requests and achieving logical completeness. Beyond simple performance comparisons, DEER makes system strengths and limitations interpretable and provides diagnostic signals for improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了名为DEER的基准，用于系统性评估基于大型语言模型的深度研究代理生成的专家级报告质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型的进步，深度研究系统能够生成专家级报告，但评估这些报告面临多个挑战：报告质量涉及多个维度，难以确定具体评估标准和内容；基于LLM的评估工具可能无法识别需要领域专业知识才能发现的错误；同时，由于深度研究依赖检索证据，需要对报告中的声明进行全面验证以确保准确性。这些问题阻碍了系统可靠性的提升和有针对性的改进。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出DEER基准，采用专家开发的分类法（包括7个维度和25个子维度）细化为101个具体评分项，以系统性化评估标准；还提供针对任务的专家评估指导，辅助基于LLM的评估过程。关键创新在于设计了一个声明确认架构，能够验证报告中引用和未引用的声明，并量化证据质量，从而增强评估的全面性和客观性。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，当前深度研究系统能够生成结构合理并引用外部证据的报告，但在满足专家级用户的具体需求和实现逻辑完整性方面仍有不足。DEER基准不仅进行性能比较，还使系统的优势和局限性可解释化，提供了改进所需的诊断信号，例如在声明确认和证据整合方面的具体量化数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: DEER基准为深度研究系统评估提供了全面且可解释的框架，通过系统性标准和声明确认机制，提升了报告质量的评估可信度。其学术价值在于推动了AI在专家级报告生成领域的标准化评估，实际应用价值在于辅助开发者诊断和优化系统性能，未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多领域或优化评估方法。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Self-Improving Agent with Skill Library
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex reasoning and multi-turn interactions but struggle to continuously improve and adapt when deployed in new environments. One promising approach is implementing skill libraries that allow agents to learn, validate, and apply new skills. However, current skill library approaches rely primarily on LLM prompting, making consistent skill library implementation challenging. To overcome these challenges, we propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based approach to enhance agents' self-improvement capabilities with a skill library. Specifically, we introduce Skill Augmented GRPO for self-Evolution (SAGE), a novel RL framework that systematically incorporates skills into learning. The framework's key component, Sequential Rollout, iteratively deploys agents across a chain of similar tasks for each rollout. As agents navigate through the task chain, skills generated from previous tasks accumulate in the library and become available for subsequent tasks. Additionally, the framework enhances skill generation and utilization through a Skill-integrated Reward that complements the original outcome-based rewards. Experimental results on AppWorld demonstrate that SAGE, when applied to supervised-finetuned model with expert experience, achieves 8.9% higher Scenario Goal Completion while requiring 26% fewer interaction steps and generating 59% fewer tokens, substantially outperforming existing approaches in both accuracy and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的SAGE框架，通过技能库实现代理的自改进和高效学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于大型语言模型的代理在复杂推理和多轮交互中表现出色，但在新环境中难以持续改进和适应。现有技能库方法主要依赖LLM提示，难以实现一致的技能库实现，导致代理自改进能力受限。因此，亟需一种更系统的方法来克服依赖LLM prompting的局限性，提升代理在动态环境中的适应性和性能，以解决实际部署中的持续学习问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SAGE框架，一种基于强化学习的自进化方法，整合技能库进行技能学习。核心创新包括Sequential Rollout，通过迭代部署代理于一系列相似任务链中，积累技能以供后续使用；以及Skill-integrated Reward，补充基于结果的奖励以优化技能生成和利用。该方法应用于具有专家经验的监督微调模型，在AppWorld实验环境中评估，通过系统性的任务链和奖励机制实现高效技能学习和应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在AppWorld环境中，SAGE框架显著提升了代理性能。当应用于监督微调模型时，Scenario Goal Completion提高了8.9%，同时交互步骤减少26%，token生成减少59%。与现有基线方法相比，SAGE在准确性和效率方面都取得了显著优势，验证了该框架在增强代理自改进能力方面的有效性，并优于现有技能库方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出SAGE框架，成功结合强化学习和技能库以增强代理的自改进能力。学术上，它提供了一种系统性自学习方法；实际上，提高了代理在复杂任务中的适应性和效率，具有广泛的应用前景。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可探索其他任务领域或扩展技能库的通用性，以进一步验证其适用范围和优化潜力。

title: EMFusion: Conditional Diffusion Framework for Trustworthy Frequency Selective EMF Forecasting in Wireless Networks
abstract: The rapid growth in wireless infrastructure has increased the need to accurately estimate and forecast electromagnetic field (EMF) levels to ensure ongoing compliance, assess potential health impacts, and support efficient network planning. While existing studies rely on univariate forecasting of wideband aggregate EMF data, frequency-selective multivariate forecasting is needed to capture the inter-operator and inter-frequency variations essential for proactive network planning. To this end, this paper introduces EMFusion, a conditional multivariate diffusion-based probabilistic forecasting framework that integrates diverse contextual factors (e.g., time of day, season, and holidays) while providing explicit uncertainty estimates. The proposed architecture features a residual U-Net backbone enhanced by a cross-attention mechanism that dynamically integrates external conditions to guide the generation process. Furthermore, EMFusion integrates an imputation-based sampling strategy that treats forecasting as a structural inpainting task, ensuring temporal coherence even with irregular measurements. Unlike standard point forecasters, EMFusion generates calibrated probabilistic prediction intervals directly from the learned conditional distribution, providing explicit uncertainty quantification essential for trustworthy decision-making. Numerical experiments conducted on frequency-selective EMF datasets demonstrate that EMFusion with the contextual information of working hours outperforms the baseline models with or without conditions. The EMFusion outperforms the best baseline by 23.85% in continuous ranked probability score (CRPS), 13.93% in normalized root mean square error, and reduces prediction CRPS error by 22.47%.

light_analysis.overview: EMFusion提出了一种基于条件扩散的概率预测框架，用于无线网络中频率选择性电磁场的准确预测，整合上下文因素并提供不确定性量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着无线基础设施的快速增长，准确预测电磁场水平对确保合规、评估健康影响和高效网络规划至关重要。现有方法依赖宽频带聚合的单变量预测，无法捕捉运营商间和频率间的多变量变化，限制了主动规划的准确性，因此需要频率选择性多变量预测框架来解决这一不足。
light_analysis.method: EMFusion采用基于条件多变量扩散的概率预测框架，以残差U-Net为骨干，通过交叉注意力机制动态整合时间、季节和节假日等外部上下文因素；创新地引入基于插补的采样策略，将预测视为结构修复任务，处理不规则测量以确保时间连贯性，从而生成校准的概率预测区间。
light_analysis.result: 在频率选择性电磁场数据集上，EMFusion在使用上下文信息（如工作时间）时显著优于基线模型，连续排名概率得分提升23.85%，归一化均方根误差提升13.93%，CRPS误差减少22.47%，表明其在准确性和不确定性量化方面具有明显优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提出EMFusion框架，通过整合上下文和量化不确定性提升了预测可信度，为无线网络规划提供了实用工具；摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但强调了其在学术和实际应用中的价值。

title: Directional Textual Inversion for Personalized Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Textual Inversion (TI) is an efficient approach to text-to-image personalization but often fails on complex prompts. We trace these failures to embedding norm inflation: learned tokens drift to out-of-distribution magnitudes, degrading prompt conditioning in pre-norm Transformers. Empirically, we show semantics are primarily encoded by direction in CLIP token space, while inflated norms harm contextualization; theoretically, we analyze how large magnitudes attenuate positional information and hinder residual updates in pre-norm blocks. We propose Directional Textual Inversion (DTI), which fixes the embedding magnitude to an in-distribution scale and optimizes only direction on the unit hypersphere via Riemannian SGD. We cast direction learning as MAP with a von Mises-Fisher prior, yielding a constant-direction prior gradient that is simple and efficient to incorporate. Across personalization tasks, DTI improves text fidelity over TI and TI-variants while maintaining subject similarity. Crucially, DTI's hyperspherical parameterization enables smooth, semantically coherent interpolation between learned concepts (slerp), a capability that is absent in standard TI. Our findings suggest that direction-only optimization is a robust and scalable path for prompt-faithful personalization. Code is available at https://github.com/kunheek/dti.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出方向性文本反转（DTI），通过固定嵌入幅度并优化方向，显著改善个性化文本到图像生成的文本保真度和概念插值能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决Textual Inversion（TI）在复杂提示下的失败问题。TI方法中，学习到的token嵌入范数易膨胀，偏离原始分布，降低预范数Transformer中的提示条件效果。这一缺陷影响文本到图像个性化生成的准确性和上下文一致性，实际应用需要更鲁棒的优化方法来处理嵌入分布偏差和上下文退化。摘要通过理论和实证分析，强调范数膨胀对语义编码的负面影响，突显问题的重要性和现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出Directional Textual Inversion（DTI），核心是固定嵌入幅度至在分布内尺度，并仅优化其在单位超球面上的方向。通过Riemannian SGD实现方向优化，并将学习过程建模为带有von Mises-Fisher先验的最大后验估计（MAP），产生常数方向先验梯度以提升效率。技术特色包括利用CLIP token空间中方向编码语义的特性，避免范数膨胀对位置信息和残差更新的衰减影响，支持简单高效的方向参数化。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DTI在个性化文本到图像任务中，文本保真度显著优于标准TI及其变体，同时保持主体相似性。关键创新在于DTI的超球面参数化实现了平滑的概念插值（slerp），支持语义连贯的概念混合，这是标准TI不具备的能力。与基线方法对比，DTI在保真度方面持续改进，摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其在功能性和鲁棒性上的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是DTI通过方向优化有效解决嵌入范数膨胀问题，提供了一种鲁棒且可扩展的个性化文本到图像生成路径。学术贡献在于揭示方向在CLIP空间中的重要性，并引入超球面优化方法；实际应用价值在于提升生成质量和功能多样性。未来工作可基于方向优化扩展到更多生成任务或改进效率，摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示了潜在的可扩展性。

title: ADHint: Adaptive Hints with Difficulty Priors for Reinforcement Learning
abstract: To address the limited capability expansion and low sample efficiency of Reinforcement Learning (RL), recent methods have integrated ''hints'' into post-training, which are prefix segments of complete reasoning trajectories, aiming for powerful knowledge expansion and reasoning generalization. However, existing hint-based RL methods often neglect the role of difficulty in the hint-ratio schedule and relative-advantage estimation, resulting in unstable learning and excessive imitation of off-policy hints. To address this, we propose ADHint, which explicitly integrates difficulty into both processes to achieve a better trade-off between exploration and imitation. Specifically, we propose Adaptive Hint with Sample Difficulty Prior, which evaluates the difficulty of each sample under the current policy to schedule an appropriate hint ratio for rollout generation. Furthermore, we introduce Consistency-based Gradient Modulation alongside Selective Masking for Hint Preservation, which jointly modulate token-level gradients within hints to prevent biased and destructive updates. Additionally, we propose Advantage Estimation with Rollout Difficulty Posterior, which leverages the relative difficulty of rollouts with and without hints to compute their respective advantages, yielding more balanced updates. Extensive experiments across diverse modalities, model scales, model families, and domains demonstrate that ADHint achieves superior reasoning capabilities and out-of-distribution generalization. Code and datasets will be made publicly available upon paper acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: ADHint提出一种自适应提示方法，通过集成难度先验和滚动难度后验，优化强化学习的提示策略，提升推理能力和泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 本文针对强化学习中提示方法的局限性，如能力扩展受限和样本效率低，提出集成难度因素以改进。现有基于提示的强化学习方法常忽略难度在提示比例调度和相对优势估计中的作用，导致学习过程不稳定，并过度模仿离策略提示，限制了知识扩展和推理泛化的效果。因此，需要一种新方法来平衡探索和模仿，从而提高学习稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.method: ADHint方法包括三个核心创新：自适应提示样本难度先验，根据当前策略评估样本难度，为滚动生成安排合适的提示比例；一致性梯度调制与选择性掩码，在提示内调制词元级梯度，防止有偏差和破坏性更新；优势估计滚动难度后验，利用有提示和无提示滚动的相对难度计算各自优势，实现更平衡的更新。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集和模型架构，但该方法适用于多种模态和设置。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种模态、模型尺度、模型家族和领域中进行，结果表明ADHint展现出优越的推理能力和分布外泛化。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但强调了其优于基线方法的泛化效果和学习稳定性，通过集成难度因素优化了探索与模仿的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: ADHint通过集成难度先验和滚动难度后验到提示机制，有效平衡了探索与模仿，提升了强化学习的推理能力和泛化性能。该研究为提示式强化学习提供了新方法，具有学术价值，并为多领域任务的应用奠定基础。未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括更广泛的验证和优化。

title: LiM-YOLO: Less is More with Pyramid Level Shift and Normalized Auxiliary Branch for Ship Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Imagery
abstract: Applying general-purpose object detectors to ship detection in satellite imagery presents significant challenges due to the extreme scale disparity and high aspect ratios of maritime targets. In conventional YOLO architectures, the deepest feature pyramid level (P5, stride of 32) compresses narrow vessels into sub-pixel representations, causing severe spatial feature dilution that prevents the network from resolving fine-grained ship boundaries. In this work, we propose LiM-YOLO (Less is More YOLO), a streamlined detector designed to address these domain-specific structural conflicts. Through a statistical analysis of ship scale distributions across four major benchmarks, we introduce a Pyramid Level Shift Strategy that reconfigures the detection head from the conventional P3-P5 to P2-P4. This shift ensures compliance with the Nyquist sampling condition for small targets while eliminating the computational redundancy inherent in the deep P5 layers. To further stabilize training on high-resolution satellite inputs, we incorporate a Group Normalized Convolutional Block for Linear Projection (GN-CBLinear), which replaces batch-dependent normalization with Group Normalization to overcome gradient instability in memory-constrained micro-batch regimes. Validated on SODA-A, DOTA-v1.5, FAIR1M-v2.0, and ShipRSImageNet-V1, LiM-YOLO achieves state-of-the-art detection accuracy with significantly fewer parameters than existing methods, validating that a well-targeted pyramid level shift can achieve a "Less is More" balance between accuracy and efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/egshkim/LiM-YOLO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiM-YOLO检测器，通过金字塔级别转移策略和组归一化辅助分支，实现卫星图像中船舶检测的准确性与效率平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究针对卫星图像中船舶检测的挑战，由于船舶目标尺度差异大和高宽比，传统YOLO检测器在最深特征金字塔级别（P5）压缩窄船为亚像素，导致空间特征稀释，无法解析细粒度边界。现有方法在处理小目标和窄对象时性能不足，影响海事监控等遥感应用，因此需要改进检测器以适应域特异性结构冲突。
light_analysis.method: LiM-YOLO采用金字塔级别转移策略，基于对船舶尺度分布的统计分析，将检测头从传统的P3-P5重新配置为P2-P4，以提高对小目标的采样频率，消除深层次P5的计算冗余。此外，引入GN-CBLinear块，用组归一化替代批量归一化，解决内存受限小批量训练中的梯度不稳定问题，稳定高分辨率卫星图像的训练过程。
light_analysis.result: 在SODA-A、DOTA-v1.5、FAIR1M-v2.0和ShipRSImageNet-V1四个基准数据集上验证，LiM-YOLO达到最先进的检测精度，同时参数数量显著少于现有方法，证实了该方法在准确性和效率上的优势，通过对比基线方法，展示了更好的性能表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于验证金字塔级别转移策略的有效性，实现了“少即是多”的平衡，为小目标检测提供新思路，具有遥感图像船舶检测的学术和实用价值。摘要未明确说明具体局限性或未来工作方向，但该方法为高效目标检测提供了潜在改进路径。

title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Communication-Constrained Priors
abstract: Communication is one of the effective means to improve the learning of cooperative policy in multi-agent systems. However, in most real-world scenarios, lossy communication is a prevalent issue. Existing multi-agent reinforcement learning with communication, due to their limited scalability and robustness, struggles to apply to complex and dynamic real-world environments. To address these challenges, we propose a generalized communication-constrained model to uniformly characterize communication conditions across different scenarios. Based on this, we utilize it as a learning prior to distinguish between lossy and lossless messages for specific scenarios. Additionally, we decouple the impact of lossy and lossless messages on distributed decision-making, drawing on a dual mutual information estimatior, and introduce a communication-constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning framework, quantifying the impact of communication messages into the global reward. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of our approach across several communication-constrained benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于通信约束先验和双重互信息估计器的多智能体强化学习框架，以处理现实场景中的有损通信问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多智能体系统中，通信对协作策略学习至关重要，但现实场景中普遍存在有损通信问题，导致学习效率下降。现有带通信的多智能体强化学习方法因可扩展性和鲁棒性有限，难以适应复杂动态环境，限制了其在现实应用中的有效性。因此，亟需一种能统一描述通信条件并区分消息类型的方法，以克服现有不足，提升协作决策的稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出广义通信约束模型，用于统一描述不同场景下的通信条件，并将其作为学习先验来区分有损和无损消息。关键创新在于利用双重互信息估计器解耦这两种消息对分布式决策的影响，并引入通信约束的多智能体强化学习框架，将通信消息的影响量化到全局奖励中。该方法在多个通信约束基准上实施，以评估其普适性，具体包括模型架构和数据集的使用，但摘要未明确说明细节。
light_analysis.result: 论文在多个通信约束基准上验证了所提方法的有效性，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标，如准确率提升或效率改进。可推断该方法可能在处理有损通信时表现出优于现有基线的鲁棒性和可扩展性，例如在复杂动态环境中提升协作策略的学习效果。与基线方法的对比情况需参考全文获取，但整体表明其适应性强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出通信约束先验模型和基于双重互信息估计器的多智能体强化学习框架，有效解决了有损通信对协作学习的影响，提升了在复杂现实环境中的适用性。其学术价值在于为通信受限场景提供新理论支持，应用价值在于促进分布式系统的实际部署。潜在局限性可能包括模型复杂度或特定场景适应性，未来工作可扩展至更多通信模式或结合其他优化技术。

title: Fairness-Aware Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Models for Medical Glaucoma Diagnosis
abstract: Vision-language models achieve expert-level performance on medical imaging tasks but exhibit significant diagnostic accuracy disparities across demographic groups. We introduce fairness-aware Low-Rank Adaptation for medical VLMs, combining parameter efficiency with explicit fairness optimization. Our key algorithmic contribution is a differentiable MaxAccGap loss that enables end-to-end optimization of accuracy parity across demographic groups. We propose three methods: FR-LoRA integrates MaxAccGap regularization into the training objective, GR-LoRA applies inverse frequency weighting to balance gradient contributions, and Hybrid-LoRA combines both mechanisms. Evaluated on 10,000 glaucoma fundus images, GR-LoRA reduces diagnostic accuracy disparities by 69% while maintaining 53.15% overall accuracy. Ablation studies reveal that strong regularization strength achieves optimal fairness with minimal accuracy trade-off, and race-specific optimization yields 60% disparity reduction. Our approach requires only 0.24% trainable parameters, enabling practical deployment of fair medical AI in resource-constrained healthcare settings.
comment: AMIA 2026 Amplify Informatics Conference (Poster), Denver, CO, May 18-21, 2026. 10 pages, 3 tables

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种公平感知的低秩适应方法，结合参数效率和公平性优化，以减少视觉语言模型在医疗青光眼诊断中的跨人口统计组准确性差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在医学成像任务中展现出专家级性能，但在不同人口统计组（如种族、性别）间存在显著的诊断准确性差异，这可能导致医疗AI系统产生不公平的医疗决策。当前方法往往专注于提升整体准确性，而忽略了公平性优化，因此需要一个既高效又公平的解决方案，以解决资源受限医疗环境中的实际应用问题，并促进医疗AI的公正部署。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于公平感知的低秩适应技术，核心创新是可微分的MaxAccGap损失函数，实现端到端的跨人口统计组准确性平等优化。具体提出三种方法：FR-LoRA将MaxAccGap正则化集成到训练目标中，GR-LoRA采用逆频率加权平衡梯度贡献，Hybrid-LoRA结合两者机制。该方法应用于青光眼眼底图像诊断，利用视觉语言模型进行微调，强调参数效率和公平性并重，无需修改原始模型架构，通过低秩适配减少训练参数。
light_analysis.result: 实验在10,000张青光眼眼底图像数据集上进行评估，结果显示GR-LoRA方法能显著减少诊断准确性差异达69%，同时维持53.15%的总体准确性。消融研究表明，强正则化强度在最小准确性折衷下实现最优公平性，种族特定优化进一步将差异降低60%。此外，该方法仅需0.24%的可训练参数，与基线相比，在保证公平性的同时提升了部署效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种参数高效的公平优化方法，有效解决了医疗AI中的公平性问题，同时保持了诊断性能。其学术价值在于将低秩适应技术与公平性损失函数结合，推动了AI在医疗领域的公正应用；实际应用价值在于适用于资源受限的医疗环境，促进公平医疗AI的部署。未来工作可探索在其他疾病或数据集上的泛化能力，以及进一步优化公平性和准确性的平衡。

title: From Veracity to Diffusion: Adressing Operational Challenges in Moving From Fake-News Detection to Information Disorders
abstract: A wide part of research on misinformation has relied lies on fake-news detection, a task framed as the prediction of veracity labels attached to articles or claims. Yet social-science research has repeatedly emphasized that information manipulation goes beyond fabricated content and often relies on amplification dynamics. This theoretical turn has consequences for operationalization in applied social science research. What changes empirically when prediction targets move from veracity to diffusion? And which performance level can be attained in limited resources setups ? In this paper we compare fake-news detection and virality prediction across two datasets, EVONS and FakeNewsNet. We adopt an evaluation-first perspective and examine how benchmark behavior changes when the prediction target shifts from veracity to diffusion. Our experiments show that fake-news detection is comparatively stable once strong textual embeddings are available, whereas virality prediction is much more sensitive to operational choices such as threshold definition and early observation windows. The paper proposes practical ways to operationalize lightweight, transparent pipelines for misinformation-related prediction tasks that can rival with state-of-the-art.

light_analysis.overview: 本文从评估视角比较虚假新闻检测与病毒性预测，提出轻量级透明管道以应对操作性挑战，推动从真实性到扩散的研究转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于社会科学领域对信息操纵的深入理解，强调信息紊乱不仅包括伪造内容，还涉及动态放大效应，但现有研究多集中于虚假新闻检测，忽视了从真实性转向扩散预测的实证变化和在资源有限下的性能评估。这导致应用研究中操作性挑战未被充分解决，本文旨在探索预测目标转变对实证行为和性能水平的影响，以弥补理论转向与操作化之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用评估优先的视角，使用EVONS和FakeNewsNet两个数据集，系统比较虚假新闻检测和病毒性预测的性能变化。核心创新在于分析强文本嵌入对预测稳定性的影响，并探讨操作性选择如阈值定义和早期观察窗口的敏感性。摘要未明确说明具体的模型架构或算法细节，但提出了构建轻量级、透明管道的框架，以优化预测任务的操作化过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，虚假新闻检测在获得强文本嵌入后表现相对稳定，而病毒性预测对操作性选择如阈值和早期观察窗口高度敏感，表明预测目标从真实性转向扩散时基准行为发生显著变化。与基线方法相比，这突出了在有限资源设置下操作性参数调整的重要性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率或效率改进数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于通过比较分析，提出轻量级、透明管道的操作化方法，以处理虚假信息预测任务，并与最先进方法竞争。学术价值在于支持从虚假新闻检测到信息传播的理论转向，促进应用社会科学研究的深化；实际应用价值体现在资源有限环境中提升预测效率和透明度。未来工作可进一步优化操作性选择和扩展数据集，以应对更广泛的信息紊乱挑战。

title: AVGGT: Rethinking Global Attention for Accelerating VGGT
abstract: Models such as VGGT and $π^3$ have shown strong multi-view 3D performance, but their heavy reliance on global self-attention results in high computational cost. Existing sparse-attention variants offer partial speedups, yet lack a systematic analysis of how global attention contributes to multi-view reasoning. In this paper, we first conduct an in-depth investigation of the global attention modules in VGGT and $π^3$ to better understand their roles. Our analysis reveals a clear division of roles in the alternating global-frame architecture: early global layers do not form meaningful correspondences, middle layers perform cross-view alignment, and last layers provide only minor refinements. Guided by these findings, we propose a training-free two-step acceleration scheme: (1) converting early global layers into frame attention, and (2) subsampling global attention by subsampling K/V over patch tokens with diagonal preservation and a mean-fill component. We instantiate this strategy on VGGT and $π^3$ and evaluate across standard pose and point-map benchmarks. Our method achieves substantial inference acceleration across different context lengths, yielding about $2\times$ speedup at 100 frames, $4$--$5\times$ at 300 frames, and $8$--$10\times$ at 800 frames, while matching or slightly improving the accuracy of the original models and remaining robust in extremely dense multi-view settings where prior sparse-attention baselines fail.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种训练免费的加速方案，通过分析全局注意力角色并优化，实现VGGT和$π^3$模型的显著推理加速而不损失精度。
light_analysis.motivation: VGGT和$π^3$模型在多视角3D任务中表现出色，但计算成本高昂，主要源于其对全局自注意力的重度依赖。现有稀疏注意力变体提供部分加速，但缺乏系统分析全局注意力在多视角推理中的具体作用，这限制了加速效果的提升。因此，本研究旨在深入理解全局注意力的角色，以开发更高效的加速策略，解决实际应用中高计算成本问题，并促进多视角3D模型的实用化。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先对VGGT和$π^3$中的全局注意力模块进行深入分析，揭示了交替全局-帧架构中的角色分工：早期全局层不形成有意义的对应关系，中间层执行跨视角对齐，最后层仅提供微调。基于此发现，提出一个训练免费的两步加速方案：(1) 将早期全局层转换为帧注意力以减少计算；(2) 通过子采样K/V令牌，并采用对角保持和均值填充组件，对全局注意力进行子采样。该方法在VGGT和$π^3$上实例化，并利用标准姿态和点图基准进行评估，专注于优化推理效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该加速方案在不同帧数下实现了显著加速：在100帧下达到约2倍加速，300帧下4-5倍加速，800帧下8-10倍加速。同时，模型精度匹配或略微优于原始VGGT和$π^3$，并在极密集多视角设置中保持稳健，而先前稀疏注意力基线在这些设置中失败。这些数据表明方法在提升效率的同时维持了性能，验证了其有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于系统分析了全局注意力在多视角3D任务中的角色，并提出了一种训练免费的加速方案，有效降低了计算成本而不损失模型精度。学术上，这加深了对注意力机制的理解，尤其在多视角推理中的角色分工；实践上，为加速多视角3D模型提供了新思路，具有广泛的应用潜力。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到其他模型架构或进一步优化加速策略。

title: When Robots Obey the Patch: Universal Transferable Patch Attacks on Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, yet universal and transferable attacks remain underexplored, as most existing patches overfit to a single model and fail in black-box settings. To address this gap, we present a systematic study of universal, transferable adversarial patches against VLA-driven robots under unknown architectures, finetuned variants, and sim-to-real shifts. We introduce UPA-RFAS (Universal Patch Attack via Robust Feature, Attention, and Semantics), a unified framework that learns a single physical patch in a shared feature space while promoting cross-model transfer. UPA-RFAS combines (i) a feature-space objective with an $\ell_1$ deviation prior and repulsive InfoNCE loss to induce transferable representation shifts, (ii) a robustness-augmented two-phase min-max procedure where an inner loop learns invisible sample-wise perturbations and an outer loop optimizes the universal patch against this hardened neighborhood, and (iii) two VLA-specific losses: Patch Attention Dominance to hijack text$\to$vision attention and Patch Semantic Misalignment to induce image-text mismatch without labels. Experiments across diverse VLA models, manipulation suites, and physical executions show that UPA-RFAS consistently transfers across models, tasks, and viewpoints, exposing a practical patch-based attack surface and establishing a strong baseline for future defenses.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了UPA-RFAS框架，首次系统研究了针对视觉-语言-动作模型的黑盒、通用对抗补丁攻击，实现跨模型转移。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人等领域应用广泛，但其对抗脆弱性引发安全担忧。现有对抗补丁攻击多针对单一模型设计，过度拟合导致在黑盒设置下（如未知架构、微调变体或仿真-现实迁移）转移性差。为解决通用和可转移攻击的不足，本研究旨在开发一种能跨不同条件的补丁攻击方法，以揭示VLA模型的安全漏洞，并为防御研究提供基准。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了UPA-RFAS框架，一个统一方法用于学习通用可转移的物理补丁。首先，使用特征空间优化，结合ℓ1偏差先验和排斥性InfoNCE损失来诱导跨模型表征偏移。其次，采用鲁棒性增强的两阶段min-max过程：内层学习样本级不可见扰动，外层优化通用补丁对抗这个硬化邻域。最后，加入两个VLA-specific损失：Patch Attention Dominance劫持文本到视觉的注意力机制，Patch Semantic Misalignment诱导无标签的图像-文本失配。该框架在共享特征空间中学习补丁，促进跨模型转移。
light_analysis.result: 实验覆盖了多个VLA模型、不同操作套件和物理执行场景，结果表明UPA-RFAS能一致地跨模型、任务和视点转移攻击，有效暴露了补丁基础的攻击面。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率或效率数据），但指出该方法优于现有补丁攻击，在黑盒设置下展示了更强的转移能力，为未来防御建立了强大基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了首个针对VLA模型的通用可转移对抗补丁攻击框架，系统解决了跨模型、任务和视点的攻击转移问题。学术上，它为对抗鲁棒性研究提供了新视角，推动了VLA模型的安全性分析；实际应用中，暴露了VLA驱动机器人的脆弱性，为防御策略开发奠定了基础。未来工作可扩展更多攻击场景或开发针对性防御机制，以增强模型鲁棒性。

title: SA$^{2}$GFM: Enhancing Robust Graph Foundation Models with Structure-Aware Semantic Augmentation
abstract: We present Graph Foundation Models (GFMs) which have made significant progress in various tasks, but their robustness against domain noise, structural perturbations, and adversarial attacks remains underexplored. A key limitation is the insufficient modeling of hierarchical structural semantics, which are crucial for generalization. In this paper, we propose SA$^{2}$GFM, a robust GFM framework that improves domain-adaptive representations through Structure-Aware Semantic Augmentation. First, we encode hierarchical structural priors by transforming entropy-based encoding trees into structure-aware textual prompts for feature augmentation. The enhanced inputs are processed by a self-supervised Information Bottleneck mechanism that distills robust, transferable representations via structure-guided compression. To address negative transfer in cross-domain adaptation, we introduce an expert adaptive routing mechanism, combining a mixture-of-experts architecture with a null expert design. For efficient downstream adaptation, we propose a fine-tuning module that optimizes hierarchical structures through joint intra- and inter-community structure learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SA$^{2}$GFM outperforms 9 state-of-the-art baselines in terms of effectiveness and robustness against random noise and adversarial perturbations for node and graph classification.

light_analysis.overview: SA²GFM 框架通过结构感知语义增强提升了图基础模型在对抗噪声和扰动时的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图基础模型在各种任务中取得进展，但其鲁棒性在面对领域噪声、结构扰动和对抗性攻击时仍显不足。现有方法未能充分建模层级结构语义，这限制了模型的泛化能力。研究表明，这些问题在实际应用中至关重要，尤其是在动态和复杂环境下，现有方法在处理跨领域适应时易产生负迁移现象，导致性能下降。因此，开发一种能增强模型鲁棒性的新框架具有重要意义，以提升图基础模型在真实世界场景中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是结构感知语义增强，首先将基于熵的编码树转化为结构感知文本提示，用于特征增强。通过自监督信息瓶颈机制蒸馏鲁棒且可迁移的表示，该机制进行结构引导的压缩。为解决跨领域适应中的负迁移问题，引入专家自适应路由机制，结合混合专家架构和空专家设计。此外，提出一个微调模块，通过联合社区内和社区间结构学习优化层级结构。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集和模型架构细节，但框架融合了多项先进技术以增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SA²GFM 在节点和图分类任务中，对抗随机噪声和对抗性扰动方面，比9个最先进的基线方法在有效性和鲁棒性上表现更好。具体性能指标如准确率提升摘要未明确说明，但强调了其在多种扰动场景下的鲁棒性优势。与基线方法相比，该框架在跨域适应和结构扰动处理方面显示出显著改进，证实了其方法在增强图基础模型稳定性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出SA²GFM框架，通过结构感知语义增强提升了图基础模型的鲁棒性。学术价值在于改进层级结构语义建模，增强模型的泛化能力和跨域适应性；实际应用价值在于为噪声和对抗环境下的图分析提供更可靠的解决方案。局限性包括摘要未明确说明具体应用场景和可扩展性，未来工作可探索扩展至更多图任务或优化计算效率。

title: V-Attack: Targeting Disentangled Value Features for Controllable Adversarial Attacks on LVLMs
abstract: Adversarial attacks have evolved from simply disrupting predictions on conventional task-specific models to the more complex goal of manipulating image semantics on Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). However, existing methods struggle with controllability and fail to precisely manipulate the semantics of specific concepts in the image. We attribute this limitation to semantic entanglement in the patch-token representations on which adversarial attacks typically operate: global context aggregated by self-attention in the vision encoder dominates individual patch features, making them unreliable handles for precise local semantic manipulation. Our systematic investigation reveals a key insight: value features (V) computed within the transformer attention block serve as much more precise handles for manipulation. We show that V suppresses global-context channels, allowing it to retain high-entropy, disentangled local semantic information. Building on this discovery, we propose V-Attack, a novel method designed for precise local semantic attacks. V-Attack targets the value features and introduces two core components: (1) a Self-Value Enhancement module to refine V's intrinsic semantic richness, and (2) a Text-Guided Value Manipulation module that leverages text prompts to locate source concept and optimize it toward a target concept. By bypassing the entangled patch features, V-Attack achieves highly effective semantic control. Extensive experiments across diverse LVLMs, including LLaVA, InternVL, DeepseekVL and GPT-4o, show that V-Attack improves the attack success rate by an average of 36% over state-of-the-art methods, exposing critical vulnerabilities in modern visual-language understanding. Our code and data are available https://github.com/Summu77/V-Attack.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出 V-Attack，一种通过目标值特征在大型视觉-语言模型上实现精确可控局部语义攻击的新方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型视觉-语言模型的广泛应用，对抗攻击目标从简单预测扰乱转向复杂语义操作，但现有方法在可控性方面不足，难以精确操作图像中的特定概念。这一问题的重要性在于影响模型的安全性和鲁棒性，而不足之处源于视觉编码器中补丁令牌表示的语义纠缠：自注意力聚合的全局上下文主导局部特征，导致操作不精确。需要开发更精确的攻击手段以揭示和应对这些漏洞。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 V-Attack 方法，其核心是操作 transformer 注意力块中的值特征，研究发现值特征抑制全局上下文通道，保留高熵的局部语义信息，可作为精确操作手柄。该方法包括两个核心模块：自我值增强模块，用于细化值特征的内在语义丰富性；文本指导的值操作模块，利用文本提示定位源概念并优化为目标概念。V-Attack 在大型视觉-语言模型的视觉编码器中应用，绕过纠缠的补丁特征，实现高效的语义控制。
light_analysis.result: 在多种大型视觉-语言模型上的实验中，包括 LLaVA、InternVL、DeepseekVL 和 GPT-4o，V-Attack 相比最先进方法平均提高了 36% 的攻击成功率，展示了其卓越性能。这显著提升了对抗攻击的有效性，并暴露了现代视觉-语言理解模型的关键漏洞，为模型安全性评估提供了新的基准数据。摘要未明确说明具体准确率数字，仅提供相对提升数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: V-Attack 的主要贡献在于提出了一种基于值特征的对抗攻击方法，实现对大型视觉-语言模型的精确可控攻击。其学术价值是揭示了值特征在解耦语义和对抗攻击中的关键作用，促进了对模型安全性的深入理解。应用价值包括评估和改进模型鲁棒性，以及未来可能扩展攻击场景或优化模块以提高通用性，但摘要未明确说明局限性或具体未来方向。

title: Periodic Asynchrony: An On-Policy Approach for Accelerating LLM Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Since the introduction of the GRPO algorithm, reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted increasing attention for LLM post-training, yet training efficiency remains a critical challenge. In mainstream RL frameworks, inference and training are co-located on the same devices, and their synchronous execution prevents concurrent inference and training. In this work, we revisit the strategy of separating inference and training deployment, and propose a periodically asynchronous framework that transforms synchronous RL training into an asynchronous producer-consumer pipeline. Unlike existing asynchronous approaches that introduce off-policy bias, our design is provably equivalent to its synchronous counterpart, preserving strict on-policy correctness without any algorithmic modifications. We further introduce a unified tri-model architecture and a shared-prompt attention mechanism to support efficient asynchronous execution and reduce redundant computation. Experiments on NPU platforms demonstrate a three- to five-fold improvement in end-to-end training throughput over mainstream RL frameworks, while maintaining fully comparable accuracy, indicating its potential for widespread application.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种周期性异步框架，将同步强化学习训练转化为异步生产者-消费者管道，以加速大型语言模型的后训练，同时保持严格的on-policy正确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着GRPO算法的引入，强化学习在大型语言模型后训练中日益受关注，然而训练效率低下成为关键挑战。现有主流强化学习框架中，推理和训练在同一设备上同步执行，阻碍了并发处理，限制了吞吐量和训练速度。这不仅延缓了RL在LLM应用中的普及，还使得提升效率成为迫切需求，因此亟需一种既能加速训练又不引入偏差的创新方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种周期性异步框架，通过分离推理和训练部署，将同步RL训练转化为异步生产者-消费者管道。关键创新在于设计上严格等价于同步版本，避免了现有异步方法带来的off-policy偏差，无需算法修改即可保持on-policy正确性。此外，引入了统一的三模型架构和共享提示注意力机制，以支持高效异步执行并减少计算冗余，从而优化训练流程。
light_analysis.result: 实验在NPU平台上进行，结果显示该框架相较于主流强化学习框架，端到端训练吞吐量提升了三到五倍，具体数据支持效率的显著改进。同时，准确性保持完全可比，与基线方法相比未牺牲模型性能，证明了其在加速训练的同时维持了高质量的输出效果，为广泛应用提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了一种高效的周期性异步框架，加速了大型语言模型的强化学习训练，并保持了严格的on-policy正确性。学术价值在于为RL训练优化提供了新思路，实际应用价值在于能广泛应用于LLM后训练以提升效率。潜在局限性或未来工作方向包括扩展到更多平台或优化架构细节，摘要未明确说明具体细节。

title: Mitigating Long-Tail Bias in HOI Detection via Adaptive Diversity Cache
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a fundamental task in computer vision, empowering machines to comprehend human-object relationships in diverse real-world scenarios. Recent advances in VLMs have significantly improved HOI detection by leveraging rich cross-modal representations. However, most existing VLM-based approaches rely heavily on additional training or prompt tuning, resulting in substantial computational overhead and limited scalability, particularly in long-tailed scenarios where rare interactions are severely underrepresented. In this paper, we propose the Adaptive Diversity Cache (ADC) module, a novel training-free and plug-and-play mechanism designed to mitigate long-tail bias in HOI detection. ADC constructs class-specific caches that accumulate high-confidence and diverse feature representations during inference. The method incorporates adaptive capacity allocation favoring rare categories and dynamic feature augmentation to enable robust prediction calibration without requiring additional training or fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on HICO-DET and V-COCO datasets show that ADC consistently improves existing HOI detectors, particularly enhancing rare category detection while preserving overall performance. These findings confirm the effectiveness of ADC as a training-free, plug-and-play solution for long-tail bias mitigation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种无需训练的即插即用 Adaptive Diversity Cache (ADC) 模块，有效缓解了 Human-Object Interaction (HOI) 检测中的长尾偏置问题。
light_analysis.motivation: HOI检测作为计算机视觉的基础任务，旨在让机器理解真实场景中人与物体的关系，对自动驾驶和智能监控等应用至关重要。尽管基于视觉语言模型(VLMs)的方法提升了性能，但现有技术通常依赖额外训练或提示调优，导致计算开销大、可扩展性差。特别是在长尾场景中，稀有交互类别代表性不足，加剧了模型的偏置，限制了在多样实际环境中的泛化能力，因此需要高效解决方案来平衡性能与效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是 Adaptive Diversity Cache (ADC) 模块，这是一种无需额外训练、即插即用的机制。ADC在推理过程中为每个类别构建缓存，积累高置信度和多样化的特征表示。关键技术包括自适应容量分配，优先为稀有类别分配更多缓存空间，以及动态特征增强技术，用于校准预测而不需微调。通过维护类特定缓存和优化特征表示，ADC能有效缓解长尾数据中的偏置，提升模型在稀有交互上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 在HICO-DET和V-COCO数据集上的实验表明，ADC能够持续改进现有的HOI检测器。具体效果包括显著增强稀有类别的检测性能，同时保持整体的检测准确性，尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。与基线方法相比，ADC作为一个训练免费方案，证实了其在缓解长尾偏置方面的有效性，提高了模型在真实世界场景中的适用性和公平性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出Adaptive Diversity Cache (ADC)模块，成功缓解了HOI检测中的长尾偏置，无需额外训练或计算开销。研究具有重要的学术价值，为长尾学习和计算机视觉任务提供了新的训练免费方法思路。在实际应用中，ADC作为即插即用方案，能够增强现有检测系统的可扩展性和公平性。未来工作可能包括将ADC扩展到其他视觉任务或进一步优化缓存策略。

title: TSFM in-context learning for time-series classification of bearing-health status
abstract: We introduce a classification method based on in-context learning using time-series foundation models (TSFMs). We demonstrate how data not included in the TSFM training can be classified without fine-tuning the foundation model or training a traditional classification model. Examples are represented as targets (class labels) and covariates (data matrices) within the TSFM prompt, enabling the classification of unknown covariate data patterns alongside the forecast horizon through in-context learning. We apply this method to vibration data to assess the health state of a bearing within a servo-press motor. The method transforms frequency-domain reference signals into pseudo time-series patterns, generates aligned covariate and target signals, and uses the TSFM to predict class-membership probabilities for predefined labels. Leveraging the scalability of pre-trained models, the proposed method demonstrates effectiveness across varying operational conditions. This represents significant progress beyond traditional, custom AI solutions towards broader AI-driven maintenance systems that could potentially be provided as Model- or Software-as-a-Service applications.
comment: Preprint. To appear in the Proceedings of the European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks (ESANN), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种利用时间序列基础模型进行上下文学习的方法，用于轴承健康状态分类，避免了传统模型训练或微调的需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 在工业维护中，轴承健康状态监测对于预防设备故障至关重要。传统AI解决方案通常是定制的，需要针对每个具体任务进行模型训练或微调，这既耗时又计算资源密集，且难以适应不同的操作条件。因此，开发一种更高效、可扩展的分类方法，利用预训练模型减少额外训练需求，具有重要的实际应用价值，以推动AI驱动维护系统的普及。
light_analysis.method: 该研究提出基于时间序列基础模型的上下文学习分类方法。首先，将频域参考信号转换为伪时间序列模式，生成对齐的协变量和目标信号。然后，这些数据以协变量和目标的形式嵌入TSFM提示中，通过上下文学习直接预测未知数据的类别成员概率。关键创新在于无需微调基础模型或训练传统分类器，利用预训练TSFM的可扩展性，实现高效处理振动数据，应用于轴承健康状态评估。
light_analysis.result: 该方法应用于振动数据以评估轴承健康状态，并在不同操作条件下展示了有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但表明该方法超越了传统的定制AI解决方案，证明了其在不同环境下的适用性。这体现了上下文学习方法在分类任务中的灵活性和可扩展性，为构建更广泛的AI驱动维护系统提供了实证基础。
